name: Stud Caves Asset-Pack
description: This Asset-Pack contains over 10 good-quality assets for your games!
detailedDescription: This Asset-Pack contains over 10 good-quality assets for your games! These assets are made by Hamsterbuilds and may not be resold. Credit for the assets must be given!
